famous quote:
"We can ignore even pleasure. But pain insists upon being attended to. God whispers to us in our pleasures, speaks in our conscience, but shouts in our pains: it is his megaphone to rouse a deaf world."
-- C.S. Lewis (The Problem of Pain)
Interview Text:
Trevor:

Trevor is a friend who I knew had a lot of experiences of prayer healing so I asked him to share one of them. Here are his words.

"Over the Christmas break (2015), I went to Spokane WA to visit my family-in-Law. the Four adults went to out to Dinner. While driving, I got a word of knowledge for someone regarding their Left hip. unlike most words of Knowledge I get which are slight pain or discomfort, this one was the presence of God concentrated into one specific area. I have never experienced this before. I asked the waitress if her hip was bothering her. She politely said no. This made my family extremely embarrassed and then mad that I would do such a thing. We left in the same car with lots of unnecessary awkward silence.

I needed to get gas so we pulled into a gas station. However, I had to go inside to pay for the Gas. I asked the cashier if she had pain in her hip. She said, "yes". Then she went on to explain that she had been in a car accident 4 years earlier. She has been having pain from the top part of her left hip that radiated to her back. Then she stated that she also has cancer (I did not ask about her Cancer or any of the details). 

I asked if I could pray for her and she said yes. I watched as her facial expression changed from curious to freaked out, scared, and then tearful. She said that something was happening in her body. but the pain was getting less and less. She then said that she had absolutely no pain in her body and her knee pain (which I did not even pray about) was completely healed.

She kept asking what did I do to her. But because she was scared and tearful she actually left the register.  I came back in to get my receipt and to check on her. She said "Still the pain was gone, but kept asking what did I do to her".  I then told her that God loved her so much that He sent me to tell her God loves her. I shared the gospel with her but she was so shocked about what happened that she did not respond. A huge seed was planted in her heart as she had an encounter with the God of Love, Jesus Christ."
Music Video Instructions: Try to let God reset a purer vision of him within you, one that replaces the other things that have such allure.
